rulesStrings.li: questDescription -> [asker_nameDef], [asker_faction_leaderTitle] of [asker_faction_name], whants to expands [asker_possessive] domain and establish a small settlement. You are famous in building settlements, so [asker_pronoun] decided to order constraction. [questPeaceful] \n\n[questNotation]

questDescription -> [asker_nameDef], [asker_faction_leaderTitle] of [asker_faction_name], tells you that [asker_pronoun] need move some people and properties to safe place. [asker_pronoun] is asking you to build a temporary camp for [asker_possessive] people. \n\n[questNotation]
questDescription -> You got message from people of [asker_faction_name], they whant to order a village contruction to you. [questPeaceful] \n\n[questNotation]
questPeaceful -> The region is peaceful and safe, no raids or other threat expected.

questNotation -> Plan contains [buildingsCount] buildings. Total value [monumentRequiredResourcesMarketValue_money]):

 Required resources (approximetly):
[monumentRequiredResources].
questName -> Build a village for asker.
questName -> Build a settlement for asker.
